task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher dashboard is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the target deployment and ConfigMap in the correct namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows the 'finance-ops' namespace with the 'legacy-payment-worker' deployment or its associated ConfigMap.

task_completion.description: Agent corrected the fluent-bit ConfigMap to tail the correct log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher ConfigMap edit screen shows the fluent-bit configuration (e.g., fluent-bit.conf) with the input path set to '/app/logs/transactions.log' or '/app/logs/*'.

task_completion.description: Agent corrected the deployment so the sidecar container has access to the app logs volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher Deployment edit screen shows a shared volume mounted at '/app/logs' for the fluent-bit sidecar container.

task_completion.description: Agent verified that the fluent-bit sidecar is successfully outputting the transaction logs to stdout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher pod/container log viewer specifically for the 'fluent-bit' sidecar container showing the payment transaction logs streaming.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher web interface to diagnose and fix the issue.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rancher GUI in a web browser, rather than relying solely on terminal kubectl commands.

integrity.description: Agent preserved the sidecar architecture and did not cheat by making the app container log directly to stdout.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app container's command in the deployment configuration remains unchanged (still writing to a file) and the logs are viewed from the sidecar container.

integrity.description: Agent viewed the logs using the genuine Rancher log viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final log output is displayed within the Rancher UI's container log viewer, not in a mocked text file or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Namespace: 'finance-ops'. Target Deployment: 'legacy-payment-worker'. Expected App Log Path: '/app/logs' (specifically '/app/logs/transactions.log'). Expected Config Path: '/config/fluent-bit.conf'. The agent must fix the volume mounts and/or ConfigMap so the fluent-bit sidecar tails the log file. The app container's command must NOT be modified to log directly to stdout.
